content:
As title stated, I just noticed that some of WoD names were replaced by machine translations in TH after the major update.
I’m not sure if there are any other places.

edit1. some of important terms were replaced by machine too <:lmfao:1408867314497228941>

-deleting previous files:

deleting files you previously uploaded to GitHub won't cause loss of previous translations!
-if you uploade translation for the same key strings again, the latest uploaded translation will overwrite the previous ones, so you can edit old translations this way
